curve_evolution.note: Rolling strip evolution (YTD): 141 sessions (2026-01-02 → 2026-07-22). Up to 24 contracts on latest date; back months join as they list.

ecb_meeting_pricing.note: Approximate meeting path from ICE 1M ESTR futures (not ECB-dated OIS / WIRP). Each meeting maps to the next month's contract as a post-decision rate proxy. Probabilities assume 25bp steps (FedWatch-style). Standard 1M futures can span multiple meetings — use Bloomberg WIRP for precise per-meeting OIS pricing.
